pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.2 to support Java 17 features and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.5.x does not support Java 17; the application will fail to compile or start due to unsupported bytecode version and removed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; without it, the project compiles for Java 8, causing runtime errors on JDK 17 due to missing modules or API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove unused Spring Data starters for Cassandra, Elasticsearch, MongoDB, Redis, and REST HAL browser.
Remove unused JDBC, JOOQ, Mustache, Retry, and Thymeleaf starters.
Remove H2 and MySQL runtime dependencies as the project switches to PostgreSQL.
Add PostgreSQL driver dependency to support the new database backend.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics exposure.
Enable Spring Security starter which was previously commented out.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter for bean validation support.
Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor for metadata generation.
Update Guava version to 31.0.1-jre to ensure compatibility with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may contain classes or methods incompatible with Java 17 module system or removed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Database Rider core and spring modules to 1.23.0 for Java 17 and Spring Boot 2.6 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Database Rider versions may not support Java 17 or the newer Spring Boot test context.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add AssertJ dependency for modern assertion library in tests.
Add TestContainers PostgreSQL module for integration testing with real database instances.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to enable layered JARs for optimized Docker builds.
Configure Surefire plugin to disable forking to improve test debugging and compatibility.
Add Git Commit ID plugin to build information.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Updated fully qualified class names in spring.factories to reflect the package rename from com.xpinjection.springboot to com.xpinjection.library.config.init.
src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.why_exists: Spring Boot fails to initialize auto-configuration components because the old class names no longer exist, resulting in ClassNotFoundException or NoSuchMethodError at startup.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Updated fully qualified class name for FailureAnalyzer in spring.factories to reflect the package rename.
src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.why_exists: Spring Boot fails to register the custom failure analyzer because the old class name is invalid, leading to startup errors or missing diagnostic capabilities.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Updated fully qualified class name for EnvironmentPostProcessor in spring.factories to reflect the package rename.
src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.why_exists: Spring Boot fails to apply environment post-processing because the old class name is invalid, causing configuration issues or startup failures.

src/main/resources/db/migration/V1.00/bo.general_idea: Replace H2-specific identity column syntax with PostgreSQL-compatible BIGSERIAL primary key definition.
src/main/resources/db/migration/V1.00/bo.why_exists: The syntax 'GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY' is not supported by PostgreSQL (the target DB for this migration), causing a runtime SQL syntax error during schema initialization.
src/main/resources/db/migration/V1.00/bo.before: id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,

src/main/resources/static/error/404.html.general_idea: Added HTML lang attribute and title element to the 404 error page for better accessibility and browser behavior.

src/main/resources/static/index.html.general_idea: Added language attribute to the HTML root element for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Added a title element to the HTML head to provide a page title.

src/main/resources/templates/error/5xx.f.general_idea: Added lang attribute to html tag for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Added a title element to the head section of the error page.

src/main/resources/templates/library.ftl.general_idea: Added lang attribute to the html tag for better accessibility and standards compliance.
Added head section with title to the HTML template.

src/test/resources/books-for-the-same-au.general_idea: Add a TRUNCATE statement to clear the book table before inserting test data to ensure test isolation.

src/test/resources/datasets/default-book.general_idea: Added DOCTYPE declaration to reference the database DTD for XML validation.
Renamed XML element from uppercase BOOK to lowercase book to align with DTD or naming conventions.
src/test/resources/datasets/default-book.before: <BOOK id="105" name="Spring in Action" author="Craig Walls"/>
src/test/resources/datasets/default-book.after: <book id="105" name="Spring in Action" author="Craig Walls"/>

src/test/resources/datasets/empty.xml.general_idea: Add DTD declaration to the XML dataset file to support schema validation or generation.
Rename dataset element from uppercase BOOK to lowercase book to match updated entity naming conventions.
Add empty expert element to the dataset to reflect the expanded data model.
Add empty recommendations element to the dataset to reflect the expanded data model.

src/test/resources/datasets/expected-boo.general_idea: Add DTD declaration to the XML dataset file to enable schema validation.
Update XML element name to lowercase to match database column naming conventions.
Add id attribute with regex pattern to handle auto-generated primary keys in test datasets.

src/test/resources/datasets/stored-books.general_idea: Add DOCTYPE declaration to link the XML dataset to its DTD schema for validation.
Add an empty recommendations element to the test dataset to ensure the table is initialized.
Rename the BOOK element to book to match the lowercase table name convention.
